# Copilot instructions — Vue-ssr

Before doing any repository work, read `CLAUDE.md` at the repository root and apply it as the always-loaded baseline context. It is the authoritative source for this repository: project identity, hard rules, agent fleet, skills index, path-scoped rules under `.claude/rules/`, and task-completion protocol — follow every instruction it contains. If you cannot access or read `CLAUDE.md`, stop and tell the user instead of proceeding. If repository instruction files conflict, `CLAUDE.md` is authoritative.
